name: Nango
description: Open-source, developer-first platform for AI agent integrations. Unified API and infrastructure enabling AI agents to interact with 700+ external APIs. Handles authentication, data sync, webhooks, and observability for agentic workflows.
capabilities: AI tool calling and action execution on APIs
Natural language to TypeScript code generation
notes: Developer-first integration platform for AI agents. Supports 700+ APIs. Production-grade infrastructure for agent-driven integrations. Code-first TypeScript approach with AI assistance for code generation.
